title: 论文提炼｜Multi-Hop Knowledge Editing via Critic-Guided Multi-Agent Reasoning
content:
论文名称：Multi-Hop Knowledge Editing via Critic-Guided Multi-Agent Reasoning
研究主题：数据系统与智能基础设施
发表 venue：ACL Findings - Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics
发表年份：2026
作者：Xudong Li, Yuhang Tian, Dandan Song, Zhijing Wu, Shuhao Zhang, Jun Yang, Yongyu Huo, Changzhi Zhou, Xinyu Zhang, Chenhao Li, Huipeng Ma, Luan Zhang, Yan Xu, Qian Liu
作者角色：Accepted collaborative paper; the public abstract/PDF has not yet been added to this repository.
一句话总结：This collaborative paper studies multi-hop knowledge editing with a critic-guided multi-agent reasoning framework.
核心内容：
This collaborative paper studies multi-hop knowledge editing with a critic-guided multi-agent reasoning framework.
适合回答的问题：

- 这篇论文与 数据系统与智能基础设施 这条研究主线的关系是什么。
